lore.ad_astra.coal_generator: Generates energy by burning fuel. The first machine you'll need.
lore.ad_astra.compressor: Compresses ingots into plates. Requires energy.
lore.ad_astra.nasa_workbench: Crafts rockets and vehicles from plates and engines.
lore.ad_astra.fuel_refinery: Converts oil into usable rocket fuel. Requires energy.
lore.ad_astra.oxygen_loader: Converts water into oxygen for space suits. Requires energy.
lore.ad_astra.oxygen_distributor: Distributes oxygen in a sealed room. Requires energy.
lore.ad_astra.water_pump: Pumps water from below into machines. Requires energy.
lore.ad_astra.solar_panel: Generates energy from sunlight. Works best on planets without atmosphere.
lore.ad_astra.energizer: Stores large amounts of energy for your base.
lore.ad_astra.cryo_freezer: Freezes fuel into Cryo Fuel for Tier 4 rockets. Requires energy.
lore.ad_astra.etrionic_blast_furnace: An advanced furnace powered by energy. Smelts faster than vanilla.
lore.ad_astra.steel_ingot: A refined metal. Smelt iron in the Compressor to create steel plates.
lore.ad_astra.steel_plate: A steel plate made in the Compressor. Used in most Ad Astra recipes.
lore.ad_astra.iron_plate: An iron plate made in the Compressor. Used in basic recipes.
lore.ad_astra.desh_ingot: A rare metal found on Mars. Used for mid-tier machines and suits.
lore.ad_astra.desh_plate: A desh plate made in the Compressor. Used in Tier 2+ recipes.
lore.ad_astra.ostrum_ingot: A rare metal found on Venus. Used for advanced machines.
lore.ad_astra.ostrum_plate: An ostrum plate made in the Compressor. Used in Tier 3+ recipes.
lore.ad_astra.calorite_ingot: The rarest metal, found on Glacio. Used for the best equipment.
lore.ad_astra.calorite_plate: A calorite plate made in the Compressor. Used in Tier 4 recipes.
lore.ad_astra.wheel: A wheel component for rovers. Crafted from steel and iron.
lore.ad_astra.engine_frame: The frame for building rocket engines.
lore.ad_astra.fan: A component used in oxygen-related machines.
lore.ad_astra.steel_engine: A Tier 1 engine. Used in the Tier 1 Rocket.
lore.ad_astra.desh_engine: A Tier 2 engine. Used in the Tier 2 Rocket.
lore.ad_astra.ostrum_engine: A Tier 3 engine. Used in the Tier 3 Rocket.
lore.ad_astra.calorite_engine: A Tier 4 engine. Used in the Tier 4 Rocket.
lore.ad_astra.steel_tank: A fluid tank for storing oxygen or fuel.
lore.ad_astra.ostrum_tank: An advanced fluid tank with higher capacity.
lore.ad_astra.tier_1_rocket: Travels to the Moon. Requires fuel and a Launch Pad.
lore.ad_astra.tier_2_rocket: Travels to Mars. Requires fuel and a Launch Pad.
lore.ad_astra.tier_3_rocket: Travels to Venus and Mercury. Requires fuel and a Launch Pad.
lore.ad_astra.tier_4_rocket: Travels to Glacio. Requires Cryo Fuel and a Launch Pad.
lore.ad_astra.rover: A land vehicle for exploring planet surfaces. Fueled by buckets.
lore.ad_astra.launch_pad: Place a rocket on this to begin launch sequence. 3x3 base.
lore.ad_astra.space_suit_helmet: Part of the Space Suit. Full set required to breathe in space.
lore.ad_astra.space_suit_chestplate: Part of the Space Suit. Holds oxygen for breathing in space.
lore.ad_astra.space_suit_leggings: Part of the Space Suit. Full set required to survive in space.
lore.ad_astra.space_suit_boots: Part of the Space Suit. Full set required to survive in space.
lore.ad_astra.netherite_space_suit_helme: An upgraded Space Suit with Netherite protection.
lore.ad_astra.netherite_space_suit_chest: An upgraded Space Suit chestplate. Holds more oxygen.
lore.ad_astra.netherite_space_suit_leggi: An upgraded Space Suit with Netherite protection.
lore.ad_astra.netherite_space_suit_boots: An upgraded Space Suit with Netherite protection.
lore.ad_astra.jet_suit_helmet: Part of the Jet Suit. Allows powered flight in space.
lore.ad_astra.jet_suit_chestplate: Part of the Jet Suit. Uses hydrogen fuel for powered flight.
lore.ad_astra.jet_suit_leggings: Part of the Jet Suit. Allows powered flight in space.
lore.ad_astra.jet_suit_boots: Part of the Jet Suit. Allows powered flight in space.
lore.ad_astra.gas_tank: Portable oxygen storage. Hold right-click to fill your Space Suit.
lore.ad_astra.large_gas_tank: Large portable oxygen storage. Fills Space Suits faster.
lore.ad_astra.zip_gun: A handheld propulsion device. Uses Cryo Fuel to fly in zero gravity.
lore.ad_astra.etrionic_capacitor: A portable energy storage device. Right-click to toggle.
lore.ad_astra.cable_duct: Connects pipes and cables through walls.
lore.ad_astra.desh_cable: An upgraded energy cable with higher transfer rate.
lore.ad_astra.desh_fluid_pipe: An upgraded fluid pipe with higher transfer rate.
lore.ad_astra.ostrum_fluid_pipe: The best fluid pipe with highest transfer rate.
lore.ad_astra.flag: A placeable flag. Claim your planet!
